tasks.instruction: Conduct market research on interactive audiobook and learning platforms. Analyze existing competitors, market trends, target audience, and create a comprehensive Product Requirements Document (PRD) for the Genesis platform. The PRD should include detailed specifications for all features mentioned in the user's requirements: Dynamic Audiobook Generation, Personalized Learning & Comprehension Tools, Interactive Reading & Annotation, Contextual Research & Expansion, and Interactive Dialogue & Reflective Integration. Save the PRD at '/data/chats/4mwmi/workspace/docs/genesis_prd.json'.
